phrase_tracker_add.event_note: Register: 'elaborate on' is academic; 'explain' is conversational
L1 calque (в случае X -> in case of X). Native form is the bare preposition.
Word choice: 'API attempt' is calqued/stiff; 'API call' is the native term

phrase_tracker_add.awkward: Probably you've decided not to extract them
phrase_tracker_add.natural: Looks like you decided to leave them out
phrase_tracker_add.event_note: Register: 'probably you've X' is L1 word order; 'looks like you X' is the native hedge

phrase_tracker_add.natural: also try to compare / on top of that, try to compare
phrase_tracker_add.event_note: L1 calque (сверху/на ⊕ -> on top). Native is 'on top of that' or just 'also'.
Word choice: 'instrument' for software is L1 calque (инструмент); native English uses 'tool'

phrase_tracker_add.awkward: did you include all problems you have encountered
phrase_tracker_add.natural: did you include all the issues you've run into
phrase_tracker_add.event_note: Register: 'problems you have encountered' is formal; 'issues you've run into' is conversational

phrase_tracker_add.natural: I'll spin up a separate branch
phrase_tracker_add.event_note: Register: 'initiate' is formal/legal; native dev usage is 'spin up' or 'create'
